subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thou hast indeed been subjected to a grievous calamity and witnessed a dire affliction through the loss of thy dear companion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی فی الحقیقه مورد مصیبت کبری گردیدی و رزیه عظمی دیدی قرین عزیز آقا
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
